caption: A news broadcast features a man wearing glasses and a traditional grey outfit with a red patterned cap. He appears in a medium shot against a blurred green foliage background. Next to him is a graphic panel labeled "ON THE PHONE," displaying a smaller image of a man and the text "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST" above the word "LAGOS." The "plustv" logo is visible in the top left corner. A purple banner at the bottom reads "PLUS POLITICS" above a larger white headline that states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The frames transition from showing viewing instructions, including "WATCH ON DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308," to displaying a web address for viewing online: "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV." The man remains in the same position throughout the sequence, and the on-screen graphics stay consistent as the bottom ticker changes.
